## Type of change

<!-- Pick one or more -->

- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] refactor — refactor without behavior change
- [ ] test — adding or updating tests
- [ ] chore — tooling, dependencies, repo maintenance
- [ ] ci — CI/CD configuration

## Checklist

- [ ] My commit messages follow Conventional Commits
- [ ] I have added tests where it made sense
- [ ] I have updated the documentation when behavior changed
- [ ] I have updated `fr.json` and `en.json` together if I touched
      user-facing strings
- [ ] I have added or updated an ADR if this introduces a meaningful
      architectural decision
- [ ] CI is green
